description_long: This is a tattered, vertical banner suspended from a robust, dark metal crossbar mounted atop a sturdy pole. The banner itself is a deep, weathered red with visible wear, fraying, and holes along the bottom edge, suggesting long-term outdoor exposure. A faded, geometric emblem or insignia in muted tones is printed centrally on the fabric, partially obscured by scratches and stains. The crossbar features pointed finials at both ends and is secured to the pole with large, decorative metal rings. The pole stands on a round, weighted base, providing stability for the entire structure. The overall design evokes a medieval or militaristic aesthetic, suitable for marking territory or denoting affiliation in an urban or event setting.
description: A weathered red banner with a faded emblem hangs from a dark metal crossbar atop a sturdy pole, featuring pointed finials and a weighted base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full banner, its tattered lower edge, and the central faded emblem.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the banner and the depth of the supporting pole and crossbar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the banner and the structure of the crossbar and pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slim profile and the attachment of the banner to the pole.
